g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of input enter the brain agent decision system?')
sendPrompt('How does the amygdala agent work — threat detection, emotional salience, fear and urgency signals?')
g.text: Output: urgency score, fear, caution flag

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the hippocampus agent store and retrieve contextual memories — vector DB, episodic retrieval?')
sendPrompt('What does the hypothalamus agent represent in an AI system — internal state, resource signals, urgency drives?')
sendPrompt('How does the nucleus accumbens agent evaluate reward potential in the decision system?')
sendPrompt('What is the limbic cingulate cortex agent — emotional conflict, tension monitoring?')
sendPrompt('How is the dorsolateral PFC agent implemented — working memory, step by step reasoning, problem solving?')
sendPrompt('What does the ventromedial PFC agent do — value comparison, subjective judgment between options?')
g.text: Output: option A is better than B

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the orbitofrontal cortex agent evaluate consequences and adjust decisions based on past outcomes?')
sendPrompt('What does the parietal cortex agent handle — numerical reasoning, logical comparison, spatial estimation?')
sendPrompt('How does the anterior cingulate cortex cortical agent detect errors and flag doubt in the reasoning pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the integration layer combine limbic emotional signals and cortical rational signals into one decision?')
sendPrompt('How does the fuel state agent work — glucose, oxygen, energy levels biasing which system dominates?')
sendPrompt('What does the final decision output look like and how is the dominant system chosen?')
sendPrompt('What is the final response format from the full brain agent system?')

svg.text: click any agent to explore its implementation
